pages.title: What To Do
pages.text: Goal: get a steadier exploration kit. Stone adds displacement resistance, recovery, sharper hostile sensing, retaliation, and the first ink-field play.$(br2)Key glyphs: $(l)þ¿│$(), $(l)µü»$(), $(l)µÿÄ$(), $(l)Õèø$(), $(l)ÕØÜ$(), $(l)Ú¡ä$(), $(l)Õó¿$().

pages.title: Stage Exit
pages.text: Stone can branch to Copper, but Copper is an endpoint. To continue the main path, fill Stone momentum, win $(l)Õè½$(), and upgrade to Iron.$(br2)Choose Copper only when you want an early side-grade instead of progression.
